name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to analytics, developer experience, or product polish
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What problem or limitation are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Idea

Describe the change you want to see.

## Why It Helps

Explain the user or contributor value.

## Possible Implementation Notes

Optional technical notes, examples, or related endpoints/files.

## Scope

Which area does this mostly affect?

- frontend / UI
- backend / API
- ingestion / data
- ML / predictions
- docs / contributor experience
